title: Authorization to grant extra racing days; races of national importance
doc_html:
§157.1.  Authorization to grant extra racing days; races of national importance

The commission shall grant extra racing days to an association requesting such days if the association is hosting a race or races deemed by the commission to be of national importance.

Acts 1989, No. 597, §1.
